author: Scott Penberthy
name: Factorized MoE with int6+zstd
blurb: 8-layer, 512-dim, 8 experts/layer (top-2). MLP experts factorized as W=UV (rank-64). Attention K/V rank-16, proj rank-32. Compression: factorization then int6 per-row quantization + zstd-22. WD=0.04, grad_clip=0.3, SWA last 50%, seq_len=2048, batch=786432, warmdown=3000.
